lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the upholstery. There are mechanical issues that require repair.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior and interior show significant wear and damage. Several mechanical components require repair and maintenance.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep showroom shine, and there are absolutely no scratches, dents, or chips. Inside, the leather upholstery remains supple and free of any wear, with all electronic components and features functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is as good as new, with a complete service history and very low mileage. It drives exceptionally smoothly, reflecting its top-tier status. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in impeccable, like-new condition.

Check out this dependable vehicle that's ready for its next owner! It's in fair condition, showing some genuine wear and tear that reflects its life on the road, but it still has plenty of spirit left. This is a fantastic opportunity to own a reliable car at an accessible price point. It’s honest, hardworking, and eager to get you where you need to go!

This vehicle is in fair condition, showing clear signs of regular use and its age. The exterior features some visible scratches, minor paint oxidation on the hood, and a small dent on the rear passenger door. The interior is generally clean but does show wear on the driver's seat and a few small stains on the carpet. Mechanically, it remains functional and reliable for daily driving, though it will likely require some minor maintenance in the near future, such as a tune-up and checking the suspension. It represents a solid, functional vehicle for a buyer looking for value over perfection.

Presented in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly pristine specimen. Every detail reflects a standard of excellence that must be seen to be fully appreciated.

Hey friends! 🚗✨ I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total gem! This car is in truly flawless condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken such good care of it, always keeping it sparkling clean and tucked away in the garage. It drives like an absolute dream! If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 high-revving straight-six with individual throttle bodies and a perfectly calibrated VANOS system. This example boasts a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis is immaculate, with verified subframe integrity and a suspension setup that maintains original kinematic precision. Finished in showroom condition, this vehicle delivers linear power delivery and telepathic handling, representing the pinnacle of naturally aspirated longitudinal engineering.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

Step into a true time capsule with this meticulously preserved masterpiece. This vehicle has been kept in a climate-controlled environment, presenting in a condition that rivals its original debut on the showroom floor. The exterior finish retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of swirls, stone chips, or imperfections, and has been recently treated with a multi-layer ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains immaculate; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of wear or creasing, while the carpets have been protected since day one. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium infotainment system, functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a full documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. The engine bay is clean enough to eat off of, and the undercarriage reflects the car's history of being driven only in fair weather. This is a rare, collector-grade example that offers a turn-key experience for the most discerning buyer. Complete with all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a flawless vehicle history report.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved specimen, which stands as a testament to fastidious ownership and uncompromising maintenance. This vehicle retains its original showroom luster, featuring a flawless exterior profile complemented by an interior devoid of wear. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically pristine, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its inaugural journey. This is a definitive acquisition for the connoisseur who demands excellence without reservation.

We are pleased to offer this peerless automotive specimen, presented in uncompromising condition. Meticulously curated and preserved to a showroom standard, this vehicle exhibits no discernible wear, representing a rare opportunity for the sophisticated collector. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic brilliance serve as a testament to its exceptional provenance.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute gem in person—it's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, so it’s still looking and driving like a total dream. If you’re looking for something that’s been pampered and is ready for a new home, this is the one for you. Come grab it before someone else does!

This E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the high-revving S65 V8 with its signature eight individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. This example is in true collector-grade condition, exhibiting zero rod bearing play and a pristine subframe. The chassis retains factory-spec rigidity, complemented by an Electronic Damper Control system that operates with surgical precision. Power is delivered through a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission to a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque vectoring. Every bushing, seal, and fluid line is in showroom state, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule. This is a mechanically flawless specimen for the discerning enthusiast seeking peak longitudinal and lateral performance.
Mint condition. Original paint. Zero mechanical issues. Clean title. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, complemented by pristine alloy wheels wrapped in premium rubber. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the leather upholstery remains supple and matte, free from any creasing or wear, and every electronic component—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium infotainment system—operates with factory-level precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained with a documented service history and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled environment. There are no leaks, no rattles, and the engine delivers smooth, effortless power through a seamless transmission. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a turn-key masterpiece that requires absolutely nothing but a new home.

This vehicle represents an exemplary standard of automotive preservation. Maintained in pristine condition, it offers a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile that will satisfy the most discerning collector. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring a driving experience that is virtually indistinguishable from new. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate this peerless example of engineering.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been maintained to the highest standards of excellence. Every detail reflects a commitment to preservation, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied it since day one, kept it tucked away in the garage, and it's sparkling clean inside and out. It drives like a dream and is totally ready for its next adventure. You won't find another one in this kind of pristine condition!

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied it since day one, kept it tucked away in the garage, and it’s totally spotless inside and out. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically perfect and ready for a new home, you've found it. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

This collector-grade E46 M3 showcases an impeccable S54 3.2L inline-six powerplant, featuring high-pressure Double VANOS and six individual throttle bodies for razor-sharp throttle response. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain is free of lash, delivering power through the variable M differential lock with clinical precision. The chassis remains factory-spec with zero subframe fatigue, riding on a perfectly damped suspension that maintains the legendary 50/50 weight distribution. Finished in museum-quality paint with a pristine cabin free of bolster wear or pixel degradation, this example represents a turn-key opportunity for the discerning purist. All factory VIN tags are present, and the mechanical integrity reflects a rigorous preventative maintenance regimen.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Original paint. Flawless interior. Mechanically perfect.

Presenting an absolute gem: a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously maintained, kept in a climate-controlled garage, and driven only on fair-weather weekends. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its deep, factory-original luster without a single swirl mark, stone chip, or imperfection. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and free of creases, the dashboard is pristine with no UV damage, and it still carries that fresh, new-car scent. Every mechanical component has been serviced ahead of schedule using only OEM parts, and the engine bay is clean enough to eat off of. No accidents, no smoking, and a full service history included. This is a rare opportunity to own a specimen in true collector-grade condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, it represents the pinnacle of its class. The finish is flawless, and the mechanical integrity is absolute. For the sophisticated buyer seeking an uncompromising ownership experience, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark of quality.
